name: @zcaceres/skill-security-bumblebee
description: Set up Perplexity's bumblebee endpoint scanner on a single developer machine for local supply-chain exposure checks. Installs the Go binary, picks an OS-appropriate NDJSON output directory, runs a baseline scan, walks through the findings, and optionally schedules recurring scans via launchd (macOS) or cron (Linux). Aimed at individuals and small teams — no MDM, no SIEM. User-triggered only — activate when the user invokes '/security-bumblebee'.
